subject: Larvitar — a small, squat bipedal Pokemon with a dark teal-green pupa-like carapace body, rust-red triangular spikes running along its head and back, and two narrow red triangular eyes; standing in three-quarter view on a paved brick-and-stone garden walkway in front of a low brick planter wall filled with pink-red and yellow flowers
description: A small, rounded Larvitar stands in three-quarter view on a warm brick-and-stone paved garden path, occupying the center of the frame at roughly mid-shot distance. Its body is a compact, seed or pupa-shaped form in dark teal-green, with rust-red triangular spikes cresting its head and trailing down its back. Two narrow red triangular eyes peer out to the viewer's left with a calm, watchful expression. Behind the creature, a low brick planter wall hosts clusters of soft pink-red and orange-yellow flowers with green foliage — the wall itself has warm terracotta and brick-red tones. The lighting is even and warm, consistent with a clear, sunny daytime outdoor garden or park setting. The overall composition is tight and character-forward, with the floral planter providing a cheerful, domestic backdrop that contrasts gently with the creature's rocky, carapace-based design.
foreground: Larvitar standing on a paved brick-and-stone garden walkway
background: low brick planter wall with clusters of pink-red, orange, and yellow flowers and green foliage
emotion: calm and watchful; slightly wary but unaggressive posture, body upright and still
